title: Bulenox vs MyFundedFutures (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Flavor Freedom
description: Bulenox and MyFundedFutures both lock the trail at SB+$100 — but Bulenox forces a PERMANENT Option 1 vs 2 pick at signup, while MFFU lets you run Core, Rapid, and Pro plans in parallel and swap flavors per account. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Bulenox vs MyFundedFutures (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Flavor Freedom
og.description: Same SB+$100 lock family. Bulenox forces a permanent intraday-vs-EOD pick at signup. MFFU lets you run Core, Rapid, and Pro in parallel. Here's how to pick.
